message:
feat(shopify): rewrite manifest to schema 2.1, add configurable timeout, expand operations

Manifest rewritten from ~200 to ~500 lines with full operation
definitions, risk annotations, and rate limit metadata for Products,
Orders, Customers, Inventory, and Fulfillment surfaces.

Client now accepts a configurable request_timeout_ms parameter instead
of hardcoding 30s, allowing tuning per deployment. All test call sites
updated to pass the default 30_000ms explicitly.

Connector implementation significantly expanded with additional operation
handlers, proper pagination, and consistent error mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,150 +1,471 @@
-[format]
-type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
 schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:2080b28004713881e4734dc4202a5b7e748c2ce62bcadc343c61cb33bfb2cad8"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.shopify"
-name = "Shopify"
+name = "Shopify Connector"
 version = "0.1.0"
-description = "Shopify Admin API connector for Products, Orders, Customers, and Inventory"
+description = "Single-shop Shopify Admin REST connector for products, orders, customers, inventory levels, and shop-health verification"
 archetypes = ["operational"]
-homepage = "https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-rest"
+format = "native"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "stateless"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "No durable connector state; one shop domain and one pre-provisioned Admin API token are injected at runtime."
 
 [zones]
 home = "z:work"
-allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:private"]
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
 allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
-tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
 
 [capabilities]
-required = ["network.outbound"]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+]
 optional = []
-forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "system.privileged",
+]
 
-[provides.operations.products_list]
-summary = "List products"
-capability = "shopify.products.read"
-risk = "low"
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get"]
+description = "Fetch one customer by numeric Shopify customer ID from the configured shop."
+capability = "shopify.customers.read"
+risk_level = "low"
 safety_tier = "safe"
-idempotency = "none"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get".input_schema]
+required = ["customer_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get".input_schema.properties.customer_id]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get".output_schema.properties.email]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get".output_schema.properties.id]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need one customer from the configured shop by numeric customer ID."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Passing a non-numeric identifier.",
+    "Expecting customer create/update/delete support; this first slice is read-only for customers.",
+]
+examples = []
+related = []
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.list"]
+description = "List the first page of customers visible to the configured shop token."
+capability = "shopify.customers.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.list".output_schema]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.list".output_schema.items]
+type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations.products_list.ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "When you need to list products in a Shopify store"
+[provides.operations."shopify.customers.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Use when you need the first page of customer records from the configured shop."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Expecting pagination or search filters; this slice returns only the first fixed page.",
+    "Echoing unnecessary customer PII into shared transcripts.",
+]
+examples = []
+related = []
 
-[provides.operations.products_get]
-summary = "Get a product by ID"
+[provides.operations."shopify.health"]
+description = "Probe /shop.json to verify that the configured Admin API token can reach the configured Shopify shop."
 capability = "shopify.products.read"
-risk = "low"
+risk_level = "low"
 safety_tier = "safe"
-idempotency = "none"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
 
-[provides.operations.products_get.ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "When you need details of a specific product"
+[provides.operations."shopify.health".input_schema]
+type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations.products_create]
-summary = "Create a product"
-capability = "shopify.products.write"
-risk = "medium"
-safety_tier = "risky"
+[provides.operations."shopify.health".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."shopify.health".output_schema.properties.healthy]
+type = "boolean"

+[provides.operations."shopify.health".output_schema.properties.shop_id]

+examples = []

+capability = "shopify.inventory.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"

-[provides.operations.products_create.ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "When you need to add a new product to Shopify"

+type = "object"
 
-[provides.operations.products_update]
-summary = "Update a product"
-capability = "shopify.products.write"
-risk = "medium"
+[provides.operations."shopify.inventory.list".input_schema.properties.location_id]

+common_mistakes = [
+    "Omitting location_id.",
+    "Expecting location discovery or inventory mutation operations from this slice.",

-[provides.operations.products_update.ai_hints]
-when_to_use = "When you need to modify an existing product"

-[provides.operations.products_delete]
-summary = "Delete a product"

-risk = "high"
-safety_tier = "dangerous"
-idempotency = "strict"
+[provides.operations."shopify.orders.create".input_schema.properties.email]

+[provides.operations."shopify.orders.create".input_schema.properties.financial_status]

+[provides.operations."shopify.orders.create".input_schema.properties.line_items]

-when_to_use = "When you need to permanently remove a product"
+[provides.operations."shopify.orders.create".output_schema]

+type = "integer"

+[provides.operations."shopify.orders.create".output_schema.properties.line_items]

+[provides.operations."shopify.orders.get"]

-[provides.operations.orders_list.ai_hints]

+[provides.operations."shopify.products.update".input_schema.properties.title]

+[provides.operations."shopify.products.update".output_schema.properties.id]

+[provides.operations."shopify.products.update".output_schema.properties.title]

 [sandbox]
 profile = "strict"
 memory_mb = 128
 cpu_percent = 25
 wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+fs_readonly_paths = []
+fs_writable_paths = []
 deny_exec = true
 deny_ptrace = true

@@ -31,10 +31,11 @@ impl ShopifyClient {
         shop_domain: &str,
         access_token: String,
         api_version: &str,
+        request_timeout_ms: u64,

+            .timeout(Duration::from_millis(request_timeout_ms))
             .build()
